title: Dortmanna lutea
taxonomy: Dortmanna lutea is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. It is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is also known as the yellow loosestrife, due to its bright yellow flowers. Dortmanna lutea is closely related to other plants in the Lythraceae family, such as the loosestrife species from the genus Lythrum. The exact classification and relationships of Dortmanna lutea are still being studied by botanists.

intro: Dortmanna lutea, also known as Golden Saxifrage, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support the immune system and aid in wound healing.
